heading: Female genital mutilation
label: 262k–2 Female genital mutilation
notes: References in TextSection 532(b) of this Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , div. A, title I, § 101(c) [title V], , , 3009–152, which is not classified to the Code.section 532(b) of Pub. L. 104–208110 Stat. 3009–121Sept. 30, 1996
amendments: References in TextSection 532(b) of this Act, referred to in subsec. (b), is , div. A, title I, § 101(c) [title V], , , 3009–152, which is not classified to the Code.section 532(b) of Pub. L. 104–208110 Stat. 3009–121Sept. 30, 1996

children.text: has, as a cultural custom, a known history of the practice of female genital mutilation; and
has not taken steps to implement educational programs designed to prevent the practice of female genital mutilation.

children.heading: “International financial institution” defined
children.label: b “International financial institution” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “international financial institution” shall include the institutions identified in section 532(b) of this Act.
